    EntityVisual
    Interface for visual components that track a game logic entity.
    FastEnemy
     
    Game
     
    GameLogicLoop
     
    GameObject
     
    GamePanel
     
    GenericVisual
    A generic visual wrapper that links a GameObject (logic) to a GraphicsEntety (Swing).
    GraphicsCannon
     
    GraphicsEngine
    The GraphicsEngine is responsible for managing the game"s window, switching between the menu and the game panel, and running the main render thread.
    GraphicsEntety
     
    GraphicsTowerFactory
    Concrete fabriek voor het maken van grafische torens (voor de GUI).

    TileType
    Value and its Definition of Grid Cel Types -1| IN VALUD INPUT 0 | PLACEABLE AREA 1 | BLOCKED AREA 2 | PROJECTILE BLOCKING AREA 3 | INTERSECTION OF TWO OR MORE PATHS 4 | PATH 1 5 | PATH 2 6 | PATH 3 code supports unlimited amount of Paths you can just add more with last value++ and last path++
    Tower
     
    TowerFactory
    De Abstract Factory interface die de blauwdruk definieert voor het aanmaken van verschillende soorten torens.
    TowerPlacer
    Handles placing towers on the map by clicking on PLACEABLE tiles.
